summary: Iteration 15 - Logo, Card/Promo Selection, and CardAlertsPage Feature Tests. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Logo implementation is correct - v=4 cache busting used consistently across all pages
Card/Promo selection in PlanningPage correctly fetches client cards and promotions when client is selected
All logo references properly updated in LoginPage, BookingPage, WebsitePage, and Layout sidebar
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ZIP file features merged correctly. Logo displays on login page (full-page left), booking page (hero), website page (hero), and gestionale sidebar. CardAlertsPage (/card-alerts) works correctly showing expiring and low balance cards. Card/Promo selection in new appointment dialog works - loads client cards and promotions when client is selected.

logo_display.login_page: PASS - Full-page logo on left panel with 'BRUNO MELITO HAIR' text
logo_display.sidebar: PASS - Logo in sidebar with 'BRUNO MELITO' text
logo_display.booking_page: PASS - Logo as hero background (4 logo images with v=4)
logo_display.website_page: PASS - Logo as hero background (4 logo images with v=4)

card_alerts_page.stats_display: PASS - Shows 'Card in Scadenza' and 'Credito Basso' counts
card_alerts_page.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Tutto a posto!' when no alerts

card_promo_selection.client_selection: PASS - Selecting client in dialog triggers card/promo fetch
card_promo_selection.ui_display: PASS - 'Card & Promozioni Disponibili' section shown with available options

backend_apis.card_alerts_expiring: PASS - Returns list of expiring cards
backend_apis.card_alerts_low_balance: PASS - Returns list of low balance cards
backend_apis.promotions_check: PASS - Returns eligible promotions for client
